پناهگاه سرچال.name: Sarchal Shelter
پناهگاه سرچال.description: One of the busiest shelters in Central Alborz and the main gateway to northern Tehran peaks.
پناهگاه سرچال.history: Built in the 1970s by the Mountaineering Federation and renovated several times since.

پناهگاه توچال.name: Tochal Shelter
پناهگاه توچال.description: At 3,900 m, the nearest fully equipped shelter to Tehran; reachable via the Tochal telecabin.
پناهگاه توچال.history: Built in the 1980s; capacity 120 makes it the largest hut near the capital.

پناهگاه شیرپلا.name: Shirpala Shelter
پناهگاه شیرپلا.description: On the popular northern Tehran valleys route; a rest stop on the Sarchal–Tochal traverse.
پناهگاه شیرپلا.history: One of the oldest Central Alborz shelters, built in the 1960s.

پناهگاه دماوند (گوسفندسرا).name: Damavand Goatfold Shelter
پناهگاه دماوند (گوسفندسرا).description: Main southern Damavand base camp at Gosfandsara with meals and lodging.
پناهگاه دماوند (گوسفندسرا).history: The oldest and best-known Damavand shelter since the 1960s.

پناهگاه برگاه دماوند.name: Damavand Bargah-e Sevom
پناهگاه برگاه دماوند.description: Third camp at 4,220 m — last equipped shelter before the Damavand summit on the south route.
پناهگاه برگاه دماوند.history: Built in the 1980s; recently equipped with solar panels.
